_what: GPT-5.5 browser-frontier attempt — preserved responses + conversation (auditable provenance for the §11e point). Self-verifying: F1s recomputed from the captured answers + frozen truths.

metadata.model: GPT-5.5 (ChatGPT web, 「极速」/fast mode = low thinking effort)
metadata.captured_via: Chrome MCP browser automation — flattened prompts typed into the ProseMirror composer; JSON-code-block responses read back via screenshot
metadata.tier: Tier-2 — browser-captured, one-off, NOT reproducible against a pinned model; recorded values only
prompt_transforms_at_submission: newlines flattened to spaces (the ChatGPT composer sends on Enter)
one mojibake DISTRACTOR per cell un-garbled (a no-impact '暂未见明显影响' news item; does NOT affect the answer)
metadata.no_token_counts: the web UI exposes none ⇒ H2b (token saving) is UNMEASURED for this point (structural ⇒ inferred to hold, drawn dashed in the cockpit)
metadata.honest_note: This is the genuine EXTREME-capability frontier point (naive F1 0.95, highest of all models). ho-2's 0.8 is NOT a capability miss: the true shipment SHP-0008 was dirt-NULLED, and GPT-5.5 correctly REFUSED to hallucinate it (a data ceiling). It lives in docs only — NOT in the protocol matrix/fixtures (can't be reproduced offline).
